zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham於大約1249年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham40歲，母親Loretta FitzRoy23歲。他和Isabel Peck至少有1個兒子。他於1294年被列為member of parliament。他去世於1322年5月7日之前在英國林可爾史爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾巴洛比哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham于大约1249年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham40岁，母亲Loretta FitzRoy23岁。他和Isabel Peck至少有1个儿子。他于1294年被列为member of parliament。他去世于1322年5月7日之前在英国林可爾史爾，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾巴洛比哥吉拉 沙智 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Marmion
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: perhaps an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name. Compare   Merriman  .
English (Lancashire; of Norman origin) and French: nickname from Old French marmion ‘monkey, brat’.

variants.name: Merriman
meanings: nickname from Middle English mirie, merie, murie ‘merry, pleasant’ + man ‘man’. Compare Merry 1. This surname is established in Ireland (perhaps as an Anglicized form of an unidentified Gaelic name; compare Marmion ) as well as England.

there has probably been some confusion with Marriman, probably an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’, or perhaps a pet form of Mary using the hypocoristic suffix -man. The surname Marriman is now vanishingly rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Marmon
meanings: variant of Marriman, an occupational name meaning ‘servant of Mary’, from the female personal name Mary (see Marie ) + Middle English man in the sense ‘servant’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham was born about 1249, in Yorkshire, England, his father, William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham, was 40 and his mother, Loretta FitzRoy, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Isabel Peck. In 1294, at the age of 46, his occupation is listed as member of parliament. He died before 7 May 1322, in Lincolnshire, England, and was buried in All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham est né environ 1249, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Loretta FitzRoy, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Isabel Peck. En 1294, à l’âge de 46 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est member of parliament. Il est décédé avant 7 mai 1322, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.All Saints Churchyard, Winteringham, Lin: All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham um 1249 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham 40 und seine Mutter Loretta FitzRoy 23. Er hatte mit Isabel Peck mindestens 1 Sohn. 1294, als er 46 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als member of parliament aufgeführt. Er starb vor 7. Mai 1322 in Lincolnshire, England und wurde in All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham è nato il circa 1249 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Loretta FitzRoy, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Isabel Peck. Nel 1294, all'età di 46 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come member of parliament. Morì prima del 7 maggio 1322, nel Lincolnshire, England, e fu sepolto a All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringhamが約1249年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringhamは40歳，母Loretta FitzRoyは23歳であった。彼はIsabel Peckとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1294年，46歳の時，職業はmember of parliamentと記録されている。彼は1322年5月7日以前にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアバーロウビーアル サインツ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.All Saints Churchyard, Winteringham, Lin: 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배로우비 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham(이)가 대략 1249년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Loretta FitzRoy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Isabel Peck(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1294년, 46세의 나이로 그의 직업은 member of parliament이었다. 그는 1322년 5월 7일 이전 영국 링코실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 배로우비 앨 세인츠 c후르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham nasceu aproximadamente 1249, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Loretta FitzRoy, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Isabel Peck. Em 1294, com 46 anos, sua profissão aparece como member of parliament. Ele faleceu antes 7 de maio de 1322, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em All Saints Churchyard, Barrowby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.All Saints Churchyard, Winteringham, Lin: алл сеинц чурчярд, барроуби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Marmion 3rd Baron Marmion of Winteringham родился около 1249 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Marmion 2nd Baron of Winteringham было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Loretta FitzRoy, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Isabel Peck. В 1294 году, в возрасте 46 лет,  он работал по профессии member of parliament. Он умер перед 7 май 1322 г. в местности линколншир, Англия и был похоронен в местности алл сеинц чурчярд, барроуби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
